description.ko: 인간의 기술과 생체 발광 생명체가 취약하고 빛나는 조화 속에 공존하는 바다의 고압 심해를 평화롭게 바라본 작품입니다.
description.en: A serene look into the high-pressure depths of the ocean, where man-made technology and bioluminescent life coexist in a fragile, glowing harmony.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-detailed shot of AQUA-5, titled 'The Abyssal Bioluminescent Cathedral.' A cluster of translucent, organic research pods submerged in the #000080 midnight zone. Massive #40E0D0 turquoise jellyfish with glowing #48D1CC tendrils drift past, pulsing with internal light. The #006994 deep sea water is thick with marine snow and micro-bubbles. High-tech floodlights from the pods illuminate jagged hydrothermal vents and strange deep-sea flora. 8k resolution, photorealistic fluid dynamics, capturing the peaceful dance of life in the high-pressure deep.
